RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/oracle/crsp_read_dbtablename_cc_all.oracle
RuleSet.GenRule: open retCursor for select distinct( $lower poptop Table reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implOracleClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ order by ClassCode asc;
